_note: Entitlements are config, not code. To onboard a new customer's permission model, edit this file, do not change the agent. visibility levels a role may see are listed below. The brand axis is enforced separately: every run is bound to exactly one brand at invocation, and no role can change its own brand or role.

sales.description: Primary call-prep principal. Operational view only.

legal.description: Exists to prove the field boundary. Sees all fields of one brand. Never runs its own brief.

power_user.description: In-house team or consultant. All fields, and may be bound to either brand across separate runs. Still one brand per run.

enforcement_rules: A field is returned only if its visibility is in the running role's can_see list.
A tool call for brand X never returns data from any other brand, regardless of role.
cross_brand=true means the role may be bound to different brands on different runs. It does NOT permit returning two brands in one run.
Every served and withheld field is written to the audit log with the reason.
